# MapInfo constructor

Static data for a single map / zone from the game table.

```csharp

```

| --- | --- |
| Id | Game-table map id. |
| Name | Localised map display name. |
| Description | Localised map description text. |
| IconPath | Addressable path for the map's icon sprite. |
